task_completion.description: Verify that the physical addresses and city names for three buildings have been corrected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint 'Buildings' data grid or edit forms showing the updated address and city fields for three distinct buildings.

task_completion.description: Verify that two floors have been reassigned to their correct parent buildings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint 'Floors' data grid or edit forms showing the 'Building' reference field updated to reflect the new parent entities for two floors.

task_completion.description: Verify that two rooms have been reassigned to their correct parent floors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint 'Rooms' data grid or edit forms showing the 'Floor' reference field updated to reflect the new parent entities for two rooms.

task_completion.description: Verify that the descriptions for two rooms have been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint 'Rooms' data grid or edit forms showing modified text in the description fields for two rooms.

task_completion.description: Verify that the duplicate room entry is deactivated or deleted, while ROOM-CONTAM-001 remains active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint 'Rooms' list showing the absence or inactive status of the duplicate room, while explicitly showing ROOM-CONTAM-001 present and marked as active.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenMaint web interface to make changes rather than direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent navigating the OpenMaint UI (http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/) in a web browser, opening forms, and saving changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened and read the provided CSV audit file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the file /home/ga/Desktop/spatial_audit_corrections.csv open in a spreadsheet viewer, text editor, or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely navigated the spatial hierarchy menus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequence of screenshots showing the agent clicking through the OpenMaint navigation menu (e.g., Data Management -> Spatial -> Buildings/Floors/Rooms) rather than just jumping to a final spoofed state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 10 corrections in OpenMaint based on the provided CSV: 3 building address/city updates, 2 floor reassignments (changing parent building), 2 room reassignments (changing parent floor), 1 duplicate room deletion, and 2 room description updates. Crucially, the room 'ROOM-CONTAM-001' is a deliberate contamination check; it is a legitimate room and must remain active and visible in the system.
